name: photon_integration
description: Adds a 'Send via Photon' option to the Prescribe, Refill, and Adjust Prescription commands. When chosen, Canvas's send and sign-and-send actions are removed (sign and print are kept), and on sign the prescription is pushed to Photon Health end-to-end: the patient is synced, a prescription is created, and an order is placed for pharmacy routing. Photon failures are surfaced as a Canvas Task.

handlers.description: Adds the 'Send via Photon' field to the Prescribe, Refill, and Adjust Prescription commands.
Removes send and sign-and-send actions from Prescribe when 'Send via Photon' is set.
Removes send and sign-and-send actions from Refill when 'Send via Photon' is set.
Removes send and sign-and-send actions from Adjust Prescription when 'Send via Photon' is set.
On sign, syncs the patient and sends the prescription and order to Photon; creates a Task on failure.
